games.author: Marco / Solida Games
games.description: A full Archipelago randomiser mod for Diablo II 1.10f. Every skill, quest reward, and zone gate is an AP location. Items, runes, gems, and skill unlocks arrive from your multiworld. Supports Normal, Nightmare, and Hell difficulty goals, a Collection goal (complete item sets), and custom goals. Fully self-contained â€” no Blizzard files required after install.
games.install_guide:
## Diablo II: Lord of Destruction â€” Install Guide

### Requirements
- You own Diablo II: Lord of Destruction
- Windows 10 or 11

### Steps
1. Click **Install** â€” the launcher downloads the full game package automatically.
2. Enter your AP server address and slot name.
3. Click **Play**.

games.author: Marco / Solida Games
games.description: An Archipelago integration for OpenTTD, the open-source transport simulation game. A standalone OpenTTD fork with a native in-game AP client â€” build rail networks, airports, and shipping routes to unlock AP items.

The Hoenn region adventure, randomized. Badges, HMs, key items, and wild encounters are shuffled into the multiworld. Runs in the launcher via the built-in BizHawk emulator â€” bring your own ROM. Check detection is still in development.

games.description: Native PC port of Ocarina of Time (Ship of Harkinian) with a built-in Archipelago client. The launcher installs the Archipelago-enabled build from GitHub; you provide your own Ocarina of Time ROM so the game can extract its assets on first launch. No emulator needed - pick the Archipelago quest and connect from the in-game menu.

Rogue Legacy 2 is a genealogical rogue-lite platformer by Cellar Door Games.
Baba Is You is a puzzle game where the rules you have to follow are present
ULTRAKILL is a fast-paced retro FPS where you feed on the blood of your
Neon White is a fast-paced card-action game about an assassin in Heaven.
AM2R (Another Metroid 2 Remake) is a 2016 fan remake of Metroid II: Return of Samus, rebuilt from the ground up with expanded areas and a full soundtrack.
Resident Evil 2 Remake (2019) is Capcom's reimagining of the 1998 survival-horror classic, following Leon and Claire through zombie-infested Raccoon City.
Resident Evil 3 Remake (2020) is Capcom's action-paced reimagining of the 1999 classic, following Jill Valentine against Nemesis across Raccoon City.
Hacknet (2015) is a terminal-based hacking simulation by Team Fractal Alligator where every command is a real Unix terminal command, placing you in a web of corporate espionage.
Caves of Qud (2015) is a deep roguelite RPG set in a far-future world of crumbling ruins, psychic mutants, and ancient chrome relics — with thousands of procedurally generated histories.

Vampire Survivors (2022) is the wildly popular bullet-heaven roguelite by poncle. The Archipelago mod by SWCreeperKing (via MelonLoader) shuffles weapon unlocks, character unlocks, and stage progression across the multiworld. Requires: your own copy on Steam and MelonLoader installed into your game directory.

Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 (2025) is the debut RPG from Sandfall Interactive — a painterly, melancholic JRPG set in a world where a Painter inscribes a number each year and everyone of that age perishes. The Archipelago mod by Demorck shuffles key items, abilities, and story progression across the multiworld.

UNBEATABLE (D-CELL GAMES) is a narrative rhythm game about a world where music is illegal. The Archipelago mod by AllPoland integrates Arcade Mode: track completions and score milestones become multiworld location checks. AP game string: unbeatable_arcade.

Nine Sols (2024) is the acclaimed Taopunk Metroidvania from RedCandleGames, blending Taoism mythology with retro-futurist cyberpunk. The Archipelago randomizer by Ixrec shuffles abilities, key items, and navigation gates across the multiworld. Compatible with Universal Tracker.

Hades II (2024, Early Access) is the roguelike sequel from Supergiant Games, following the witch Melinoe through the Underworld. The Archipelago mod by JFrog-55 shuffles boon unlocks, weapon forms, and story progression across the multiworld.

FlipWitch - Forbidden Sex Hex (2023) is a side-scrolling Metroidvania platformer (MomoGames/Critical Bliss). The Archipelago mod by Witchybun is one of the most actively maintained community mods with 57+ releases, randomizing collectibles, boss encounters, shop items, and quest progression. Note: adult content (R18+).

SIGNALIS (2022) is the acclaimed indie survival horror from rose-engine (96% Very Positive on Steam). Inspired by Silent Hill and Resident Evil, you play as Elster searching for her lost partner in a dystopian nightmare. The Archipelago randomizer shuffles key items and pickups across the game.

Lethal Company (2023) is the co-op indie horror sensation by Zeekerss in which you and friends scavenge abandoned moons to meet profit quotas while fending off nightmarish creatures. 11.9M+ copies sold, 97% positive. The Archipelago mod randomizes moon unlocks, equipment, and milestones. Connect in-game via Terminal: /connect server:port slot password.

PEAK (2025) is the viral co-op mountain climbing roguelite from Aggro Crab and Landfall Games — 130K+ reviews at 95% positive. The Archipelago mod (PEAKPELAGO) randomizes gear unlocks, checkpoint flags, and map regions across the multiworld. AP game string is all-lowercase 'peak'.

The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered (2025) is Bethesda/Virtuos's Unreal Engine 5 remake of the 2006 RPG classic. The Archipelago mod by POD-io shuffles main quest gates, Daedric shrines, guild questlines, skill books, and key items using a file-based bridge. Two-part install: launcher stages the in-game mod, APWorld must be installed in Archipelago separately.
